Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Optimisation classification cartouche LMD-PPV: 99.79% precision

Corrections majeures pour atteindre une precision quasi-parfaite:

Features H_s et rho_corr \(bitwise.py, agent_0_extraction.py\):
- compute_spatial_homogeneity_from_frame\(\): fraction paires voisins identiques
- compute_spatial_autocorrelation\(\): correlation spatiale reelle entre pixels
- Corrige le bug ou H_s et rho_corr etaient toujours 0

Dimension A - Type de processus \(agent_1_classification.py\):
- N=0 -> MARKED \(blocs vides\)
- m<=4 et m_eff>=m-1 -> MONOCHROMATIC \(peu de couleurs actives, C_color=0\)
- Precision: 100%

Dimension C - Representation \(features.py, objective.py, run_optimization.py\):
- Regles basees sur N au lieu de density:
  - N=0 -> TIMESTAMPS \(R1\)
  - N<50 -> COUNT \(R2\)  
  - N>=50 -> COMBINATORIAL \(R4b\)
- Precision: 100%

Resultats finaux sur 950 blocs:
- Dimension A: 100.00%
- Dimension B: 99.79%
- Dimension C: 100.00%
- Exacte \(A+B+C\): 99.79%
- Overhead: 0%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
